free instant test

Draw a Perfect Circle

Freehand circles are famously humbling: your brain knows exactly what a circle is and your hand refuses to cooperate. Draw one and get graded to the decimal, instantly. Most people land in the 80s. Above 95% is genuinely rare. Slow, constant speed, and drawing from the shoulder — not the wrist — is the trick.

▶  START THE TEST
Typical score80–90%
Genuinely rareabove 95%
The dare in this onebeat 89.0%
Attempts it usually takesmore than you think

Questions

How do you draw a perfect circle by hand?

Constant speed matters more than accuracy — go slow and steady, pivot from the shoulder rather than the wrist, and don’t stop mid-stroke. The grader scores roundness as a percentage instantly.

Is a 90% circle good?

Yes — most people score in the 80s. Above 95% is rare enough that it’s worth a screenshot.
